items.title: Tom Dundon's Real Leverage Play: The NBA's Cheapest Owner Has Portland Right Where He Wants It
items.body_excerpt: The Portland Trail Blazers are a definitionally average team, tucked away up there in Country. They aren’t a plausible LeBron James destination and shouldn’t theoretically be front of mind for the NBA world. And yet, the Blazers lead off Brian Windhorst’s Summer League buzz…
